name: Unictron Technologies Corporation
summary: Unictron Technologies Corp. engages in the development, manufacture, and sale of antennas and piezoelectric ceramic elements for use in various electronic devices in Taiwan and internationally. The company provides antennas, such as chip, patch, and custom-made antennas; and piezoelectric ceramic elements, including automobile parking sensors, ultrasonic transducers, weaving machine actuators, and touch panel sensors. It also offers over-voltage and over-current circuit protection components comprising spark gaps, gas tubes, thyristors, transient voltage suppressors, ZnO-based varistors, PPTC resettable fuses, and other fuses. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Hsin-Chu, Taiwan.
